# Resumely App Store Screenshots

Generate the complete upload package:

```bash
./scripts/generate-app-store-screenshots.sh
```

Final drag-and-drop folders:

- `app-store-v1/iphone-6.9/`
- `app-store-v1/ipad-13/`

Each folder contains 10 ordered PNG files. Upload each directory to its matching App Store Connect device-size section.
